label: Clerk's Cell
description: This compact bedroom continues the Ironwrit Lodgings’ legalist austerity, its plastered brickwork left unadorned and its corners squared by built-in joinery. A narrow bedstead is set into the wall beside an iron-hasped cupboard whose interior bears stamped inventory marks consistent with Varric Holdfast’s inspection culture. A small writing shelf stands beneath a shuttered slit window, its surface scored with knife-straight ruled lines and ink stains from copied ordinances. Sound transmits readily through the thin mortar, and the door’s heavy latch and warded keyhole testify to the building’s routine audits and curfews.
